Annotated truss capture

Since the last update of devel/glib20 I get the following error message when starting sylpheed (mail/sylpheed):

$ sylpheed

[ noting happens for a long time ]

Error creating proxy: Timeout was reached (g-io-error-quark, 24)

[application starts]

I've attached an annotated truss capture.
